source_files: public/locales/<lang>/loc_home.json for lang in de, en, fr
_meta.description: Landing page: hero, section teasers, dataset stats strip.
_meta.format: Each entry: context (where the string appears in the UI, its role, placeholders and length/grammar constraints) + the current de/en/fr texts as translation reference. Use the context when translating into a new language; a null text means the key is missing in that language file.
_meta.generated: 2026-07-13, code-verified against app/ sources; regenerate when public/locales texts or consuming components change.

home.tagline.context: Homepage (app/routes/home.tsx) hero: the tagline paragraph shown directly under the parlhub logo wordmark. One calm descriptive sentence.
home.tagline.en: A portal for the parliaments of Switzerland and Liechtenstein.
home.tagline.de: Ein Portal für die Parlamente der Schweiz und Liechtensteins.
home.tagline.fr: Un portail pour les parlements de Suisse et du Liechtenstein.

home.search_label.context: Homepage search: visually hidden (sr-only) <label> for the search input — read by screen readers only. Noun.

home.search_placeholder.context: Homepage search: placeholder text inside the search input; keep short, ends with an ellipsis.

home.search_button.context: Homepage search: label of the submit button next to the search field (with a magnifier icon). Imperative verb, must stay short.

home.search_scope_label.context: Homepage: aria-label of the group of scope chips under the search field that pick which data section the search submits to (e.g. 'Search in: People, Votings, …'). Screen-reader only; a preposition phrase that is followed by section names.

home.search_scope_hints.people.placehold.context: Homepage search: placeholder inside the search input while the 'people' scope is selected — concrete EXAMPLE queries, prefixed with the localized 'e.g.'. Shown for the People catalogue (name, place, postcode). Keep short (it must not truncate on mobile); the example terms are deliberately NOT translated — they must be real German/French/Italian query strings that actually hit the data; translate only the leading 'e.g.'.

home.search_scope_hints.people.hint.context: Homepage search: the small grey line under the search input while the 'people' scope is selected, naming which fields the query matches in the People catalogue (name, place, postcode). One short sentence, mirrors the info-tooltip wording of the same catalogue.
home.search_scope_hints.people.hint.fr: Recherche le nom, la localité et le code postal.

home.sections.people.context: Homepage: label of a search-scope chip and of the linked count in the live dataset strip ('12'345 People'). Short plural noun for members of parliament (MPs).

home.sections.votings.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label. Short plural noun for parliamentary (roll-call) votes.

home.sections.affairs.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label. 'Affairs' = legislative business items (de 'Geschäfte', fr 'objets') — motions, postulates, bills etc., not private affairs.

home.sections.speeches.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label. Plural noun for speeches/interventions given in parliament.

home.sections.bodies.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label for the 'bodies' section. The section key is 'bodies' but the display term chosen is 'Parliaments' (federal, cantonal, communal parliaments). Short plural noun.

home.sections.groups.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label for the 'groups' section — committees, commissions and parliamentary groups within a parliament (de 'Gremien'). Keep short.

home.sections.meetings.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label. Plural noun for parliamentary sittings/sessions (de 'Sitzungen').

home.sections.texts.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label. Plural noun for full text contents of parliamentary documents.

home.sections.documents.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label. Plural noun for parliamentary documents (files/PDFs attached to affairs).

home.sections.interests.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label. 'Interests' = declared lobbying/interest ties of MPs (register of interests), not hobbies.

home.sections.organizations.context: Homepage: search-scope chip / dataset-strip count label. Plural noun for organizations (companies, associations) linked to MPs via interest ties.

home.stats_updated.context: Homepage dataset strip (bottom of hero): prefix before the last data-sync date, rendered as 'Data updated: 12 Jul 2026'. Keep short; a colon and the localized date are appended in code.

home.start_link.context: Homepage: text of the link under the search box leading to the /start guided quick-links page. Frames it as quick links to what's found where (federal chambers, cantons, communal parliaments) — not a mandatory starting point.
home.start_link.en: Quick links to the federal chambers, cantons and communal parliaments
home.start_link.de: Quicklinks zu Bund, Kantonen und Gemeindeparlamenten
home.start_link.fr: Liens rapides vers les chambres fédérales, les cantons et les parlements communaux

metas.home.title.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_home' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. home page SEO <title>.

metas.home.desc.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_home' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. home page meta-description.
metas.home.desc.en: Browse the parliaments of Switzerland and Liechtenstein: members, votes, speeches, lobbying ties and more. Non-profit, open source.
metas.home.desc.de: Die Parlamente der Schweiz und Liechtensteins durchsuchen: Ratsmitglieder, Abstimmungen, Reden, Lobby-Verbindungen und mehr. Nicht kommerziell, Open Source.
metas.home.desc.fr: Explorer les parlements de Suisse et du Liechtenstein : parlementaires, votes, interventions, liens de lobbying et plus. Non lucratif, open source.
metas.home.desc.it: Esplora i parlamenti di Svizzera e Liechtenstein: parlamentari, votazioni, interventi, legami di lobbying e altro. No profit, open source.
metas.home.desc.es: Explore los parlamentos de Suiza y Liechtenstein: diputados, votaciones, discursos, vínculos de lobbying y más. Sin fines de lucro, código abierto.
